description: IPv6 range create POSTs prefix_length (and linode_id when routing to an instance), and requires exactly one assignment target (Go now mirrors Python's linode_id-or-route_target requirement). The prefix_length range and route_target format still diverge (see report).

cases.name: creates a range routed to a linode
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This creates an IPv6 range and changes networking configuration. Set confirm=true to proceed.
